executive_summary: Google patched a Chrome zero-day vulnerability (CVE-2026-5281) that is actively being exploited in the wild—users must update immediately. The Canadian Cyber Security Centre (CCCS) issued an alert for a critical Citrix NetScaler ADC/Gateway vulnerability (CVE-2026-3055). North Korean threat actors compromised the widely-used Axios npm package in a supply chain attack, and ShinyHunters claims to have breached Cisco Systems, allegedly exposing source code and customer data including Salesforce records. Multiple ransomware groups (Akira, Everest) published new victims, and attackers are actively exploiting several Oracle WebLogic remote code execution flaws.

items.name: Lazarus Group (UNC1069, North Korea-linked APT)
items.targets: Axios npm package (supply chain attack), AWS environments via TeamPCP campaign
items.ttps: T1195.002 (Supply Chain Compromise: Software Supply Chain), T1059 (Command and Scripting Interpreter), T1078 (Valid Accounts for cloud enumeration)

items.name: ShinyHunters
items.targets: Cisco Systems (alleged breach of source code and customer data including Salesforce records)
items.ttps: T1567 (Exfiltration Over Web Service), T1078 (Valid Accounts)

items.name: TeamPCP
items.targets: AI startup Mercor, AWS environments (supply chain attack via LiteLLM)
items.ttps: T1195.002 (Supply Chain Compromise: Software Supply Chain), T1526 (Cloud Service Discovery for post-compromise enumeration)

items.name: Akira Ransomware
items.ttps: T1486 (Data Encrypted for Impact), T1562.001 (Impair Defenses: Disable or Modify Tools using legitimate IT tools)

items.name: Handala (Iran-linked)

items.ttps: T1190 (Exploit Public-Facing Application using CVE-2025-55182), T1078 (Valid Accounts), T1083 (File and Directory Discovery), T1530 (Data from Cloud Storage Object)

items.name: CrystalX MaaS operators
items.targets: Victims via Telegram distribution (Stealer, RAT, prankware features)
items.ttps: T1219 (Remote Access Software), T1555 (Credentials from Password Stores), T1005 (Data from Local System)

items.name: DeepLoad malware operators
items.targets: Victims via ClickFix social engineering attacks
items.ttps: T1204.002 (User Execution: Malicious File), T1027 (Obfuscated Files or Information)

items.name: Casbaneiro (banking trojan)
items.targets: Latin America and Europe via phishing with dynamic PDF lures
items.ttps: T1566.001 (Phishing: Spearphishing Attachment), T1204.002 (User Execution: Malicious File), T1082 (System Information Discovery)

canada_landscape.summary: The Canadian Centre for Cyber Security (CCCS) issued Alert AL26-006 warning of a critical vulnerability (CVE-2026-3055) affecting Citrix NetScaler ADC and Gateway products. No Canadian-specific retail or financial institution breaches were identified in this reporting period, though general North Korean supply chain attacks and ransomware activity pose ongoing risk to Canadian organizations.

report_2w.executive_summary: Canada's cybersecurity authority (CCCS) issued an alert on March 20 for a critical Microsoft SharePoint vulnerability (CVE-2026-20963) requiring immediate patching. Three other vulnerabilities are being actively exploited in the wild: CVE-2026-3055 (Citrix NetScaler memory leak), CVE-2025-53521 (F5 BIG-IP remote code execution now on CISA's must-patch list), and CVE-2026-33017 (Langflow unauthenticated remote code execution). Iran-linked group Handala successfully breached FBI Director Kash Patel's personal Gmail account, demonstrating continued Iranian cyber aggression. The TeamPCP supply chain attack hid malware inside audio files distributed via compromised Python packages, affecting developers worldwide.

canada_landscape.summary: The Canadian Centre for Cyber Security (CCCS) issued Alert AL26-005 on March 20, 2026, warning of a critical Microsoft SharePoint vulnerability (CVE-2026-20963) requiring immediate patching. Rogers Communications and Fido confirmed a data breach potentially affecting millions of Canadian customer records. No other Canadian critical infrastructure incidents were identified in this reporting period.
canada_landscape.financial: Rogers Communications and Fido (telecommunications/media) confirmed data breach affecting potentially millions of customer records
